segments.text: Vindicate me, O Lord, For I have walked in my integrity. I have also trusted in the Lord; I shall not slip.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Examine me, O Lord, and prove me; Try my mind and my heart.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: For Your lovingkindness is before my eyes, And I have walked in Your truth.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I have not sat with idolatrous mortals, Nor will I go in with hypocrites.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I have hated the assembly of evildoers, And will not sit with the wicked.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I will wash my hands in innocence; So I will go about Your altar, O Lord,
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: That I may proclaim with the voice of thanksgiving, And tell of all Your wondrous works.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Lord, I have loved the habitation of Your house, And the place where Your glory dwells.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Do not gather my soul with sinners, Nor my life with bloodthirsty men,
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: In whose hands is a sinister scheme, And whose right hand is full of bribes.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: But as for me, I will walk in my integrity; Redeem me and be merciful to me.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: My foot stands in an even place; In the congregations I will bless the Lord.
segments.speaker: David
